title: Antibacterial compounds and uses thereof
abstract: Provided herein are compositions and methods for the treatment of infections resulting from antibiotic-resistant strains of bacteria.
claims: 1. A pharmaceutical composition for the treatment of an antibiotic-resistant bacterial infection, the composition comprising a therapeutically effective amount of a compound of Formula II or stereoisomers, tautomers, or pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof and a pharmaceutically acceptable carrier;
